entity: James Harden 60 PTS + 10 REB + 11 AST vs Orlando Magic on 2018-01-30 (HOU 114-107; the only 60-point triple-double in NBA history at the time)

query_target.sql: SELECT pts FROM analytics_player_game_complete WHERE full_name = 'James Harden' AND game_date = '2018-01-30' AND pts = 60 AND reb = 10 AND ast = 11

notes: Active player; match:gte per the active-player convention. The SQL includes reb=10 AND ast=11 to uniquely identify the triple-double row (Harden has multiple 60+ point games). The fixture pins the 60-point triple-double on the date BBR records it.
